hero_subheadline: Self-service, wash & fold, and commercial laundry — done right.
hero_hours_pill: Open daily 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Last wash 9:00 PM
services_self_desc: Our modern Wascomat Clarus Vibe machines handle everything from a single load to oversized comforters. Fast cycle times, quiet operation, and app-based payment make it easy.
services_self_detail: Open daily 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Last wash 9:00 PM
services_wf_desc: Drop off your laundry and we take care of the rest. Your clothes are washed, dried, and neatly folded — ready for pickup the same day or next day.
services_commercial_desc: Scheduled pickup and delivery for businesses of any size. We serve gyms, restaurants, Airbnb hosts, hotels, salons, and medical offices with custom recurring schedules.
why_01_body: Our Clarus Vibe commercial machines deliver powerful cleaning, quiet operation, and faster cycle times for every load size.
why_02_body: A well-maintained space with plenty of room, on-site seating, and vending machines for soap and snacks.
why_03_body: We are part of the Pomona community — not a chain. Every customer matters and every visit is personal.
why_04_body: Download the AirWallet app and your first wash is on us. App payments are accepted on every machine.
commercial_desc: Scheduled pickup and delivery for gyms, restaurants, Airbnb hosts, hotels, salons, and medical offices. We build a recurring schedule around your operation — so laundry is one less thing on your list.
commercial_map_caption: Our service area covers the Pomona Valley, Inland Empire, and surrounding communities.
commercial_map_alt: CleanMax Laundry commercial service area map covering Pomona, Ontario, Chino, Rancho Cucamonga, and surrounding cities
app_desc: Download the AirWallet mobile app and your first wash is on us. Pay through the app on any machine — no coins, no hassle.
app_note: First wash free with in-app payment
faq_a1: Self-service laundry is open daily from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM, with the last wash at 9:00 PM. Wash & Fold drop-off is available from 6:00 AM to 9:00 PM.
faq_q2: How does wash and fold work?
faq_a2: Drop off your laundry and we take care of the rest. Your clothes are washed, dried, and neatly folded, ready for pickup. Starting at $1.50 per pound.
faq_q3: Do you offer pickup and delivery for businesses?
faq_a3: Yes. We provide commercial laundry service with scheduled pickup and delivery for gyms, restaurants, hotels, Airbnb hosts, salons, and medical offices. Contact us for a custom quote.
faq_a4: Yes, free on-site parking is available.
faq_a5: We use Wascomat Clarus Vibe commercial machines — known for powerful cleaning, quiet operation, and fast cycle times.
faq_q6: How do I get the free wash?
faq_a6: Download our mobile app through AirWallet and your first wash is free when you pay through the app.
footer_tagline: Pomona's laundromat for self-service, wash & fold, and commercial laundry. Locally owned. Open daily.
seo_why_4: Free first wash with the AirWallet app

seo_laundromat_intro: Looking for a clean, modern laundromat near {city}, CA? CleanMax Laundry is located at 1009 E Holt Ave in Pomona — {desc}. Our Wascomat Clarus Vibe machines handle everything from everyday loads to large comforters, open daily from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM with easy app-based payment.
seo_laundromat_machines: Wascomat Clarus Vibe — fast, quiet, handles all load sizes
seo_laundromat_payment: AirWallet app payment — first wash free
seo_laundromat_city_para: CleanMax Laundry proudly serves customers from {city} and throughout {county} County. Whether you need a quick wash or are tackling a full week of laundry, our Pomona location is conveniently accessible for {city} residents. We keep our facility clean, bright, and well-maintained — with on-site parking to make every visit comfortable.
seo_laundromat_faq_q1: Where can I find a laundromat near {city}, CA?
seo_laundromat_faq_a1: CleanMax Laundry at 1009 E Holt Ave in Pomona is one of the closest full-service laundromats to {city}. We're open daily from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM.
seo_laundromat_faq_q2: What are the hours for a laundromat near {city}?
seo_laundromat_faq_a2: CleanMax Laundry is open every day from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Last wash begins at 9:00 PM.
seo_laundromat_faq_q3: Does the laundromat near {city} have large-capacity machines?
seo_laundromat_faq_a3: Yes. We use Wascomat Clarus Vibe commercial machines that handle loads of all sizes — from small everyday loads to oversized comforters and blankets.
seo_laundromat_faq_q4: Is there parking at CleanMax Laundry?
seo_laundromat_faq_a4: Yes, free on-site parking is available at our Pomona location.
seo_laundromat_faq_q5: Can I pay with my phone at the laundromat near {city}?
seo_laundromat_faq_a5: Yes. CleanMax Laundry accepts payment through the AirWallet mobile app. Download the app and your first wash is free.
seo_wf_intro: Need wash and fold drop-off service near {city}, CA? CleanMax Laundry makes laundry day effortless. Drop off your clothes at 1009 E Holt Ave in Pomona — {desc} — and we take care of the rest. Washed, dried, and neatly folded. Starting at $1.50/lb on weekdays with same-day and next-day options.
seo_wf_step1: Drop off your laundry at our Pomona location (open 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM daily).
seo_wf_step2: We wash, dry, and neatly fold every item.
seo_wf_step3: Pick up your clean, folded laundry — same day or next day.
seo_wf_city_para: We serve {city} residents and businesses with professional drop-off laundry service. Our drop-off window is open daily from 6:00 AM to 9:00 PM, making it easy to stop by on your way to work or heading home. Customers from {city} and throughout {county} County trust CleanMax for consistent, careful laundry service.
seo_wf_faq_q1: Where can I find wash and fold laundry service near {city}, CA?
seo_wf_faq_a1: CleanMax Laundry at 1009 E Holt Ave in Pomona offers wash and fold drop-off service for {city} residents. Drop-off hours are daily 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM.
seo_wf_faq_q2: How much does wash and fold cost near {city}?
seo_wf_faq_a2: Wash and fold starts at $1.50/lb on weekdays and $1.75/lb on weekends. Same-day service is $1.75/lb (weekday) or $2.00/lb (weekend). A $25 minimum applies.
seo_wf_faq_q3: Can I get same-day wash and fold service near {city}?
seo_wf_faq_a3: Yes. CleanMax Laundry offers same-day wash and fold service when you drop off during our morning hours. Same-day pricing starts at $1.75/lb (weekday).
seo_wf_faq_q4: How long does wash and fold take near {city}?
seo_wf_faq_a4: We offer next-day and same-day turnaround options. Next-day is available at $1.50/lb (weekday). Same-day is available at $1.75/lb (weekday) for early drop-offs.
seo_wf_faq_q5: Is there a minimum order for wash and fold near {city}?
seo_wf_faq_a5: Yes, there is a $25 minimum order for wash and fold service at CleanMax Laundry.
seo_commercial_intro: CleanMax Laundry offers commercial laundry pickup and delivery for businesses in {city}, CA and throughout the Inland Empire. We work with gyms, restaurants, Airbnb hosts, hotels, salons, and medical offices to handle linens, uniforms, and textiles on a custom recurring schedule. No more laundry runs — we come to you.
seo_commercial_step1: Contact us to discuss your laundry needs and volume.
seo_commercial_step2: We set up a recurring pickup and delivery schedule.
seo_commercial_step3: Clean linens and uniforms are returned on time, every time.
seo_commercial_city_para: We provide reliable commercial laundry service to businesses in {city} and throughout {county} County. Our team builds a pickup and delivery schedule around your operations — ensuring clean laundry is always ready when you need it. Contact CleanMax to set up a custom commercial laundry plan for your {city} business.
seo_commercial_faq_q1: Does CleanMax offer commercial laundry pickup near {city}, CA?
seo_commercial_faq_a1: Yes. CleanMax Laundry provides scheduled commercial laundry pickup and delivery for businesses in {city} and surrounding areas. Call (626) 340-3098 for commercial inquiries.
seo_commercial_faq_q2: What types of businesses does CleanMax serve near {city}?
seo_commercial_faq_a2: We serve gyms, restaurants, hotels, Airbnb hosts, salons, spas, medical offices, schools, daycares, and auto shops in the {city} area and throughout the Inland Empire.
seo_commercial_faq_q3: How does commercial laundry pickup and delivery work near {city}?
seo_commercial_faq_a3: We set up a recurring schedule based on your business's laundry volume. Our team picks up soiled linens and uniforms and returns them clean, folded, and ready to use.
seo_commercial_faq_q4: Can I get a custom laundry schedule for my business in {city}?
seo_commercial_faq_a4: Absolutely. CleanMax Laundry offers fully custom pickup and delivery schedules. Contact us at laundry@cleanmaxlaundry.com or call (626) 340-3098 to discuss your needs.
seo_commercial_faq_q5: Is there a minimum order for commercial laundry near {city}?
seo_commercial_faq_a5: Minimums vary by business type and schedule. Contact us directly for a custom commercial quote tailored to your operation.
